analyst_briefing: Weekly data shows stability across domains with no basis for score movements due to lack of sustained evidence. Defence sees episodic positive signal from Germany's 'Responsibility for Europe' strategy (I2, Defense News Tier 2), targeting top conventional force status by 2039 with PESCO alignment, and France-Poland bilateral advances (I5); hold recommended as single-week without implementation trajectory. All other domains (energy, tech, trade, diplomatic) report null developments (I3, I4, I6), confirming thin coverage but no setbacks. Zero new hybrid threats (I1); Russia posture shows notable absence of incidents despite threat designation. US-EU stable/neutral per tracker. Single SCEM flag on Russian deterrence nexus. No patterns, attributions, or contradictions require action; monitor for structural follow-through on German strategy.
